L

leaderBoard - Variable in class model.AccountCollection
 
LeaderPane - Class in view_controller
This class represents the leader board in the GUI of the Wordle game.
LeaderPane() - Constructor for class view_controller.LeaderPane
initializes the LeaderPane and sets up the layout
loadAccount() - Method in class model.AccountCollection
Loads the AccountCollection from a file if it exists, otherwise returns a new instance.
login() - Method in class view_controller.LoginPane
Handles the login process.
login(String, String) - Method in class model.AccountCollection
Attempts to log in with the specified username and password.
Login() - Constructor for class view_controller.WordleGUI.Login
 
loginButton - Variable in class view_controller.LoginPane
 
LoginPane - Class in view_controller
This class represents the login pane for the Wordle game.
LoginPane(AccountCollection) - Constructor for class view_controller.LoginPane
Constructor for LoginPane.
loginPopup(LoginPane, AccountCollection) - Static method in class view_controller.WordleGUI.Login
Displays the login popup window.
logout() - Method in class model.AccountCollection
Logs out the currently active account and saves its state.
